case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. HENRY WALDEMAR PEREZ BRAVO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED SEP-30-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ BRAVO, HENRY WALDEMAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ BRAVO, HENRY WALDEMAR $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT HENRY WALDEMAR PEREZ BRAVO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ BRAVO, HENRY WALDEMAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
